response.justification: The candidate is a poor fit for this role, which requires an experienced C++ developer with a background in multi-threading, networking, and ideally, industrial automation. His resume shows only a brief, 7-month C++ role almost a decade ago. His extensive experience is primarily in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and the D programming language, which are not the core requirements for this position. He also lacks the specified experience in secure development lifecycles (IEC 62443) and industrial protocols.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior/staff-level software engineer with a focus on software craftsmanship.
Strong background in event-driven architectures and high-throughput microservices, albeit in different tech stacks.
Experience with advantageous skills like Node.js and building large-scale platforms from the ground up.
concerns: Critically lacks recent and significant professional C++ experience; the only listed role was brief and nearly a decade ago.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation, secure development lifecycles (SDL), or specific standards like IEC 62443.
Primary expertise in web development (TypeScript, Node.js) and Dlang is a fundamental mismatch for a high-performance C++ systems role.
